about:
I'm a B.Tech Information Technology student with a strong passion for software development and problem-solving. I enjoy creating efficient, user-friendly applications and continuously expanding my knowledge of modern technologies.

 interests lie in full-stack web development, data structures and algorithms, and machine learning. I have experience working with technologies such as C++, JavaScript, React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and Git/GitHub. I believe in writing clean, maintainable code and building solutions that are both reliable and scalable.

I'm always eager to learn new technologies, take on challenging opportunities, and collaborate with others to create meaningful and impactful software.
